flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Siena Heights University fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (22.2% → 17.6%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Siena Heights University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
